Appearances: John Gidding (323.261.8580) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona via Court Call; Stephen M. Lawniczak of Gordon & Rees LLP (986.5900) for defendant Salama; Kendall A. Layne of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (362.2580) for defendants Schilt and Tenax.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Plaintiff has not presented any new facts or law to support a motion for reconsideration.
